# Auto-generated by PROBE Phase 10 (KernelGPT + DeepSeek)
# Linux MD RAID ioctl interface

include <uapi/asm/ioctl.h>
include <uapi/linux/major.h>
include <uapi/linux/raid/md_u.h>
include <uapi/linux/raid/md_p.h>

resource fd_md[fd]

syz_open_dev$md(dev ptr[in, string["/dev/md#"]], id intptr, flags flags[open_flags]) fd_md

ioctl$md_RAID_VERSION(fd fd_md, cmd const[RAID_VERSION], arg ptr[out, mdu_version_s])
ioctl$md_GET_ARRAY_INFO(fd fd_md, cmd const[GET_ARRAY_INFO], arg ptr[out, mdu_array_info_s])
ioctl$md_GET_DISK_INFO(fd fd_md, cmd const[GET_DISK_INFO], arg ptr[inout, mdu_disk_info_s])
ioctl$md_GET_BITMAP_FILE(fd fd_md, cmd const[GET_BITMAP_FILE], arg ptr[out, mdu_bitmap_file_s])
ioctl$md_RESTART_ARRAY_RW(fd fd_md, cmd const[RESTART_ARRAY_RW])
ioctl$md_STOP_ARRAY(fd fd_md, cmd const[STOP_ARRAY])
ioctl$md_STOP_ARRAY_RO(fd fd_md, cmd const[STOP_ARRAY_RO])
ioctl$md_RUN_ARRAY(fd fd_md, cmd const[RUN_ARRAY])
ioctl$md_SET_ARRAY_INFO(fd fd_md, cmd const[SET_ARRAY_INFO], arg ptr[in, mdu_array_info_s])
ioctl$md_ADD_NEW_DISK(fd fd_md, cmd const[ADD_NEW_DISK], arg ptr[in, mdu_disk_info_s])
ioctl$md_HOT_REMOVE_DISK(fd fd_md, cmd const[HOT_REMOVE_DISK], arg intptr)
ioctl$md_HOT_ADD_DISK(fd fd_md, cmd const[HOT_ADD_DISK], arg intptr)
ioctl$md_SET_DISK_FAULTY(fd fd_md, cmd const[SET_DISK_FAULTY], arg intptr)
ioctl$md_SET_BITMAP_FILE(fd fd_md, cmd const[SET_BITMAP_FILE], arg intptr)
ioctl$md_CLUSTERED_DISK_NACK(fd fd_md, cmd const[CLUSTERED_DISK_NACK])

mdu_version_s {
	major	int32
	minor	int32
	patchlevel	int32
}

mdu_array_info_s {
	major_version	int32
	minor_version	int32
	patch_version	int32
	ctime	int32
	level	int32
	size	int32
	nr_disks	int32
	raid_disks	int32
	md_minor	int32
	not_persistent	int32
	utime	int32
	state	int32
	active_disks	int32
	working_disks	int32
	failed_disks	int32
	spare_disks	int32
	layout	int32
	chunk_size	int32
}

mdu_disk_info_s {
	number	int32
	major	int32
	minor	int32
	raid_disk	int32
	state	int32
}

mdu_bitmap_file_s {
	pathname	array[int8, 4096]
}
